steps.prompt: First — I'm the biggest land animal in the world. I have a long trunk and huge ears. Find me!
steps.feedback: Elephant! Elephants live in Africa and Asia.

steps.prompt: I'm the tallest animal on Earth. I have a very long neck and eat leaves from the tops of trees.
steps.feedback: Giraffe! They can reach leaves no other animal can.

steps.prompt: This one is called the king of the jungle. Do you think it eats plants — or other animals? Find it!
steps.feedback: Lion! Lions hunt other animals for food. They live in Africa.

steps.prompt: Now find these two — the one that swings through trees, and the one with a hump on its back!
Find the black and white stripy one — its name starts with the /z/ sound. Zzz...
steps.feedback: Zebra! /z/ — the last letter of the alphabet.

steps.prompt: Find the big cat with orange and black stripes — not a lion, but just as fierce!
steps.feedback: Tiger! Tigers are the largest cats in the world.

steps.prompt: Last one — find the slow one that carries its home on its back!
